creator: hokan@me.umn.edu
text:
It's good to know that others use this port...

I will take some time to get it upgraded.



On Thu, Jul 26, 2012 at 07:20:14AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of sysutils/modules,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/170186 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/170186
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
